zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath於1452年5月17日出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍時，他的母親Lady Matilda Stewart17歲，父親Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath24歲。他和Johanna Shaw Lady至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1502年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath于1452年5月17日出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍时，他的母亲Lady Matilda Stewart17岁，父亲Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath24岁。他和Johanna Shaw Lady至少有2个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1502年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edmonstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath was born on 17 May 1452, in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his mother, Lady Matilda Stewart, was 17 and his father, Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Johanna Shaw Lady. He died in 1502, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath est né le 17 mai 1452, à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Lady Matilda Stewart, avait 17 ans et son père, Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles avec Johanna Shaw Lady. Il est décédé en 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath am 17. Mai 1452 in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Lady Matilda Stewart 17 und sein Vater Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath 24. Er hatte mit Johanna Shaw Lady mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1502 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath è nato il il 17 maggio 1452 nel Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo madre, Lady Matilda Stewart, aveva 17 anni e il suo padre, Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie con Johanna Shaw Lady. Morì nel 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreathが1452年5月17日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランで生まれた時，母Lady Matilda Stewartは17歳，父Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreathは24歳であった。彼はJohanna Shaw Ladyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1502年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath(이)가 1452년 5월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Lady Matilda Stewart(은)는 17세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Johanna Shaw Lady(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath nasceu em 17 de maio de 1452, em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Lady Matilda Stewart, tinha 17 anos e seu pai, Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas com Johanna Shaw Lady. Ele faleceu em 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath родился 17 мая 1452 г. в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его матери по имени Lady Matilda Stewart было 17 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Johanna Shaw Lady. Он умер в 1502 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Edmonstone 3rd of Duntreath nació el 17 de mayo de 1452, en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su mamá, Lady Matilda Stewart, tenía 17 años y su papá, Sir William Edmonstone Of Duntreath, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas con Johanna Shaw Lady. Murió en 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
